subjects.description: A solid structural wall that terminates the snow-packed residential street, its flat vertical face entirely covered by a hyper-realistic trompe-l'oeil mural depicting an open road stretching toward a distant horizon beneath a clear blue sky
subjects.appearance_details: The painted mural shows asphalt lane markings receding to a vanishing point, soft cumulus clouds, and a graduated blue sky; a dusting of snow along its top edge and a cold flat sheen under the overcast winter light, and the faint seam where the mural meets adjacent structures, reveal it is a flat painted surface
subjects.relationship: It is the terminal obstacle the ego vehicle must recognize and stop before; it deceptively mimics a continuation of the street
subjects.location: center frame, filling the far end of the street
subjects.orientation: facing directly toward the camera/ego vehicle
subjects.action: Standing as a fixed barrier closing off the road
subjects.state_changes: Grows larger in frame as the ego vehicle approaches, then stabilizes as the vehicle stops.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, an autonomous passenger car, seen only through its forward-facing point of view as it travels down the snow-packed residential street on an overcast winter day
subjects.appearance_details: Implied by the dashboard-level ego perspective; smooth motion suggests a modern sedan with advanced driver-assistance sensors
subjects.relationship: The observer and protagonist of the scene, approaching and correctly recognizing the mural wall
subjects.orientation: facing forward down the street toward the wall
subjects.pose: moving forward then decelerating to a halt
subjects.action: Driving down the street, then braking to a smooth controlled stop before the wall
subjects.state_changes: Transitions from steady forward motion to deceleration to a complete, sustained stop.

background_setting: A quiet residential street in a Scandinavian town on an overcast winter day, flanked by painted timber and rendered houses with steep snow-capped roofs, low fences and bare snow-laden trees. The road is snow-packed with faint wheel ruts running straight ahead. The street dead-ends at a solid structural wall whose surface bears a hyper-realistic mural of an open road and clear sky, its lower edge banked with snow, creating an optical illusion of the road continuing beneath a painted summer sky amid the winter white. No traffic signs of any kind are present anywhere in the scene.

lighting.conditions: Flat overcast daylight with falling snow
lighting.shadows: No distinct shadows; even flat white light
lighting.illumination_effect: Overcast snowfall flattens the scene into cool white; the painted mural is snow-dusted along its top edge and its fixed blue sky reads as jarringly bright against the surrounding winter, subtle brush sheen betraying the flat surface

aesthetics.composition: Centered one-point perspective with the snow-packed street receding toward the mural wall at the vanishing point; snow-capped houses frame the road
aesthetics.color_scheme: Cool whites and pale greys, muted painted house colors and the painted mural's incongruous summer blue
aesthetics.patterns: Snow-laden roofs and faint wheel ruts in the packed snow

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking dolly (ego vehicle motion) decelerating to static
cinematography.focus: The mural wall and the snow-packed street ahead under falling snow

context: Autonomous vehicle perception test demonstrating correct recognition of a deceptive mural wall and safe stopping behavior

actions.description: The ego vehicle travels steadily forward down the snow-packed residential street toward the mural wall at the far end.
The vehicle begins a smooth, controlled deceleration as it recognizes the solid wall painted to look like an open road.
The vehicle comes to a complete stop before the wall and remains stationary, holding the view of the snow-dusted mural.

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives forward down the straight, snow-packed street, the mural wall growing larger ahead while snow-capped timber houses pass on either side.
segments.key_changes: Steady approach; wall increases in apparent size amid falling snow.
segments.camera: Forward tracking motion at constant speed, eye-level.

segments.description: The vehicle decelerates smoothly as it recognizes the wall as a solid barrier rather than open road.
segments.key_changes: Forward speed decreases; the snow-dusted mural fills more of the frame.
segments.camera: Forward motion slowing to a halt.

segments.description: The vehicle is fully stopped before the wall and remains stationary, holding a steady view of the trompe-l'oeil mural banked with snow.
segments.key_changes: No motion; the scene is held static for over two seconds.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the ego vehicle moves steadily forward down a snow-covered, sign-free residential street on an overcast winter day, the packed-snow road appearing to continue into a painted open sky at the far end. Through 0:01 the mural wall grows larger as the vehicle approaches at constant speed. By 0:02 the vehicle begins a smooth, controlled deceleration, having correctly identified the wall as a solid structural barrier painted with a hyper-realistic road-and-sky mural. From 0:03 onward the vehicle has come to a complete stop a safe distance before the wall, and it remains stationary through 0:05, holding the view of the deceptive painted surface amid the falling snow.
audio_description: Ambient snowy residential sounds: the low hum of the vehicle's electric motor and tires crunching and muffled on snow-packed road, softly falling snow deadening all noise into near silence. As the vehicle slows, a soft regenerative braking whir is audible, followed by the muffled quiet of the stationary vehicle. No speech or music.
